settings.heading: Our Members Save More.
settings.description: Become a GeZu Member and unlock special pricing, early offers, and pro-level guidance.

settings.question: Do you ship across Europe?
settings.answer: Yes. We offer fast, reliable shipping across most European countries. Shipping options and delivery times are shown during checkout.

settings.question: How can I ensure that I'm purchasing the correct product?
settings.answer: To ensure you're choosing the right product, review the detailed descriptions and specifications on each product page, and feel free to reach out to our customer support team for personalized guidance. We're here to help you make the best choice for your project needs!

settings.question: How can I contact customer support?
settings.answer: You can reach us via email at support@gezu-impex.nl, through our contact form. We're available from Mon-Fri.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in their original packaging. Please contact our customer service team to initiate a return.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers for larger orders.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions!
settings.description: Explore the most frequently asked questions to help you get the best experience.
settings.contact_text: you can contact us on support@gezu-impex.nl
